name: PULSE BIOSCIENCES, INC.
summary: Part I Overview We are a novel ablation company committed to health innovation using our patented Nano-pulse Stimulation (NPS) technology, a revolutionary energy modality that delivers nanosecond-duration pulses of electrical energy, each less than a millionth of a second long, to nonthermally clear or kill targeted cells. NPS technology, also referred to as Nanosecond Pulsed-Field Ablation (nsPFA) technology when used to ablate cellular tissue, can be used to treat a variety of medical conditio...
